sc.animals.na: Not applicable; grocery retailer with no animal testing or Leaping Bunny certification relevance.

political.s: Goods Unite Us B — minimal PAC, employees Democratic-leaning. [goods-unite-us]

charity.s: $70M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.42% of revenue).
charity.amt: Not disclosed (in-kind food donations; tens of millions of pounds annually estimated)
charity.focus: Food insecurity, hunger relief, local community nonprofits

environment.s: MSC + Seafood Watch sustainable-sourcing policy across frozen + canned. [MSC certified]

labor.s: 2 OSHA severe-injury reports in past 2y (0 amputations); 12 since 2015.

dei.s: As of 2025–2026, Trader Joe's has publicly maintained its DEI commitments and refused to roll back diversity programs amid widespread industry retreats by Walmart, Target, and Amazon. The company has documented initiatives including seeking to increase shelf space for Black-owned suppliers and factoring 'neighborhood diversity' into new store site selection; however, it has also faced multiple race discrimination and retaliation lawsuits, including a 2023 settled case (Jarmon v. Trader Joe's, E.D. Pa.) and a 2026 EEOC-supported race/disability discrimination suit (Kempf v. Trader Joe's, M.D. Tenn.), creating a mixed on-the-ground record.

animals.s: 100% cage-free shell-egg pledge fulfilled in US private label. MSC + Seafood Watch sustainable-sourcing policy across frozen + canned. [Cage-free fulfilled · MSC certified]

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

privacy.s: Terms-of-service privacy grade C (mixed) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

wiki.extract: Trader Joe's Company is an American grocery store chain headquartered in Monrovia, California, U.S. with 631 locations across the United States as of January 15, 2026.

cases.caseName: Trader Joes Company v. 4PX Express USA
NASERI v. TRADER JOE'S EAST, INC.

health.s: 1 CPSC recall (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the candle flame can spread from the wick to the wax causing a larger than expec.

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was loading crates of oranges on a flat cart. A stack of five crates of oranges fell over and struck the employee, causing them to fall to the floor. The employee was hospitalized with a fractured right hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by object pushed or pulled by person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was pulling a U-boat out of their walk-in freezer that had product on it. The U-boat collided with a pallet of product and the employee's wrist was caught between, resulting in a fractured wrist.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was stocking cheese and fell backward to the floor while descending a step ladder. Her left leg twisted in the fall, resulting in the dislocation of her knee.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was using a 2-step ladder to stock bread. They missed a step while coming down and fell onto their back, sustaining a fractured left hip.

An employee was using a U-boat cart to move product from the access storage on the sidewalk. A box fell off the U-boat cart and the employee stopped the cart to pick up the box from the floor. Due to the uneven surface of the paved sidewalk, the U-boat cart began to shift and tipped over. As the employee quickly moved out of the way, she fell, striking her left hip on the ground.

topHazards.label: The candle flame can spread from the wick to the wax causing a larger than expected flame, posing a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Trader Joe's Company Recalls Mango Tangerine Scented Candles Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Trader Joe's Mango Tangerine Scented Candles with SKU 56879. The candles are white colored wax with a cotton wick in a tin container. The candles weigh about 5.7 ounces, and SKU number 56879 is located on the bottom of the tin container.
hazards: The candle flame can spread from the wick to the wax causing a larger than expected flame, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: The firm has received 14 reports of incidents involving high flames with the recalled candles, including three reports of minor property damage and two reports of minor burns.
